capabilityRefs.summary: 2D scene graph, components, collision, triggers, and deterministic local evidence refs.
Data-first behavior model refs for patrol, collect, contact damage, door, win, hazard, and ability examples.
Evidence-gated level and scene planning with placeholders and reviewer-visible needs.
Manifest references existing placeholders or fixture-scoped assets with source and license metadata.
Scenario and evidence contracts for deterministic local checks and read-only dashboard export.
3D capability gate refs exist but do not imply broad 3D prototype behavior.
Procedural creation remains outside this mapping; references may only record unsupported gaps.

coreLoops.title: Move, collect, and prove outcome
coreLoops.scopeBoundary: bounded mechanic slice, not a full-game generator, review required before later planning.

sceneLevelNeeds: spawn area, collision bounds, and collectible placement refs
assetNeeds: placeholder sprite refs from manifest with source/license metadata
scenarioNeeds: scenario asserts movement input, collect event, and evidence artifact binding
mappings.evidenceBoundary: requirement-linked advisory mapping; not generation authority; review required before any later prototype planning.

boundary: Evidence-gated prototype planning only; GDD mechanics remain untrusted until Rust/local validation and review-gated apply. This mapping provides no autonomous unrestricted game creation, no source or script mutation, no asset generation, and browser read-only or draft-only inspection.
